policies.notes: Real MCHK judgments remain internal-only until commercial republication consent is granted. Synthetic fixtures may still be released under release_mode=synthetic_demo with public_excerpt treatment.

Real DCHK judgments remain internal-only until written licence confirmation. From 14 July 2018 DCHK publishes written judgments where charges were found proved; that coverage change does not authorise public republication by RegLens. Synthetic fixtures may still be released under release_mode=synthetic_demo with public_excerpt treatment.
